model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on a target element in the provided image.
Looking at the image, there is a small green rectangle in the top left corner.
This green rectangle is the target element.
I need to find the center coordinates of this green rectangle.

Coordinates of the green rectangle:
Top-left: (15, 12)
Bottom-right: (88, 66)
Center x = (15 + 88) / 2 = 103 / 2 = 51.5
Center y = (12 + 66) / 2 = 78 / 2 = 39

Confidence is high since there's only one distinct element.
